Container.Name: rsync-dashboard
Container.Overview: Read-only dashboard for your unRAID rsync backup jobs. Reads the log files your existing rsync scripts already write and shows per-job status, duration, data transferred, and files deleted. Never touches the scripts themselves and can't trigger backups.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to reach the dashboard from a browser

Config.Name: Logs Folder
Config.Description: The folder your rsync scripts already write their logs to (LOG_DIR in your scripts). Mounted read-only -- the dashboard cannot modify or delete anything here.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone so log timestamps display correctly

Config.Name: History Limit
Config.Description: How many past runs to keep per job

Config.Name: Cache Seconds
Config.Description: How long results are cached before logs are re-read
